# Agent Academy Naming Guide

## Course Mission Naming

### Title Format

Action-forward, descriptive titles. Start with a gerund or noun phrase.

- ✅ "Integrate with MCP Servers"
- ✅ "Authoring Agent Instructions"
- ✅ "Obtaining User Feedback with Adaptive Cards"
- ❌ "MCP" (too vague)
- ❌ "How to Use MCP" (too tutorial-sounding)

### Codename Format

`OPERATION [WORD]` — ALL CAPS. Must be:

- Thematically related to what the mission does
- Dramatic / evocative
- 1-3 words max

| Mission Topic | Good Codename Examples |
|---------------|----------------------|
| Hiring / Recruitment | TALENT SCOUT, HEADHUNTER |
| Document generation | PAPER TRAIL, WORDSMITH |
| Multi-agent systems | WOLF PACK, HIVE MIND |
| AI Safety | GUARDIAN, SAFE HOUSE |
| MCP integration | PROTOCOL ZERO, WIRE TAP |
| Adaptive Cards | CARD SHARK, ROYAL FLUSH |
| Triggers / Automation | SILENT ALARM, TRIPWIRE |
| Dataverse | VAULT KEEPER, DEEP STORAGE |
| SharePoint | FIELD INTEL, OPEN ARCHIVES |
| Model selection | SHARP MIND, MODEL BEHAVIOR |
| Publishing | BROADCAST, GOING LIVE |
| Licensing | THE LEDGER, BUDGET CODE |

## Special Ops Naming

### Title Format

More casual, often includes tech name + a personality/emoji:

- "Microsoft Copilot Studio ❤️ MCP"
- "Power Platform CLI MCP"
- "Copilot Studio + Adaptive Cards in Teams"

### Badge Name (Bottom Ribbon)

A punny, themed name. 2-3 words max. Wordplay strongly preferred.

| Mission Topic | Badge Name Ideas |
|---------------|-----------------|
| MCP | MCP JOKER · PROTOCOL BREAKER · SERVER SIDE |
| Adaptive Cards | CARD SHARK · ROYAL FLUSH · HOUSE OF CARDS |
| Document generation | PAPER TRAIL · WORDSMITH · DOC DROP |
| Multi-agent | WOLF PACK · DEEP STATE · CHAIN OF COMMAND |
| AI Safety | SAFETY NET · CLEAN SWEEP · GUARDIAN |
| Dataverse | DATA MINER · VAULT KEEPER · DEEP DIG |
| SharePoint | FIELD INTEL · PAPER CHASE |
| Power Automate | TRIGGER HAPPY · AUTO PILOT |
| Teams deployment | TEAM PLAYER · MISSION BROADCAST |
| Azure | SKY HIGH · CLOUD NINE |
| Authentication | LOCKED IN · KEY MASTER |
| Connectors | WIRE TAP · LINKED IN (careful — trademark) |
| Analytics | DEEP SCAN · READ THE ROOM |
| ALM / DevOps | CLEAN SLATE · LAUNCH CODES |

### Slug Format

kebab-case, descriptive, 2-4 words:

- `pac-cli-mcp`
- `mcs-mcp`
- `adaptive-cards-teams`
- `sharepoint-knowledge`
- `agent-analytics`

### Tags

**Industry tags** (use 0-2):
`healthcare` · `financial-services` · `retail` · `manufacturing` · `hr` · `education` · `government` · `non-profit` · `legal` · `real-estate`

**Technology tags** (use 1-3):
`mcp` · `adaptive-cards` · `dataverse` · `sharepoint` · `teams` · `azure` · `power-automate` · `generative-ai` · `multimodal` · `connectors` · `power-pages` · `azure-ai-foundry` · `pac-cli`

**Pattern tags** (use 1-2):
`multi-agent` · `rag` · `automation` · `document-processing` · `notifications` · `integration` · `agentic-loop` · `authentication` · `testing` · `alm`

## Difficulty Ratings (Special Ops Stars)

| Stars | Level | What it means |
|-------|-------|---------------|
| ⭐ | Beginner | No prior Copilot Studio experience needed. Pure configuration, no code. |
| ⭐⭐ | Intermediate | Requires Recruit completion OR basic Copilot Studio familiarity. May include light scripting or CLI. |
| ⭐⭐⭐ | Advanced | Requires Operative-level skills. Involves Azure, code, complex configuration, or multi-system integration. |

## Scenario Brainstorming for Special Ops

Good scenarios are:

1. **Specific** — "Contoso HR needs to parse resumes from email" not "A company wants to use AI"
1. **Relatable** — Real problem that real organizations face
1. **Self-contained** — No dependencies on data/setup from other missions
1. **Slightly dramatic** — Fits the spy aesthetic without being silly

### Scenario Formula

`[Fictional org/team] needs to [solve problem] using [feature]. [1 sentence of stakes or impact.]`

Examples:

- "The Contoso IT Help Desk is drowning in tickets. Deploy an MCP-powered agent to automate triage and route requests in real time."
- "Field operatives at TechFlow Solutions need instant access to inventory data without leaving Microsoft Teams. Wire up an Adaptive Cards agent to deliver the intel."
- "The Northwind recruitment team is manually reviewing 200 resumes per week. Build a multi-modal prompt pipeline to extract and evaluate candidate data at scale."
